extDescription.message: Anchor focussessie-handhaving — URL-filter en vriendelijke blokkeerpagina.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the browser's extensions page and store listing.

focusSession.description: Eyebrow label marking an active focus session (block page + popup).

requestAccess.description: Button: ask the teacher to allow the blocked site.

focusEnforcement.description: Footnote shown at the bottom of the block page and popup.

blockPageTitle.description: Browser tab title for the block page.

blockBody.message: Je zit in een actieve focussessie, dus deze site is nu even gepauzeerd. Er is niets mis — hij staat alleen nog niet op de lijst met toegestane sites.
blockBody.description: Block-page explanation of why the site is paused.

blockAskTeacher.message: Heb je deze site nodig voor je werk? Vraag het je leerkracht; die kan hem vanuit het dashboard toevoegen — de pagina opent dan vanzelf.
blockAskTeacher.description: Block-page hint about requesting access from the teacher.

goBack.description: Button: return to the previous page.

blockUnknownUrl.description: Shown in place of the blocked URL when none was provided.

blockNoSession.message: Geen actieve sessie — herlaad de pagina.
blockNoSession.description: Status shown when the block page has no session to attach a request to.

blockSendingRequest.description: Status while an unblock request is being sent.

blockRequested.description: Status after an unblock request was sent successfully.

blockReachTeacherFailed.description: Error status when an unblock request could not be delivered.

blockApproved.description: Status when the teacher approved access and the page is reopening.

blockReasonUnknown.description: Fallback reason embedded in blockReachTeacherFailed when the background reports none.

popupActiveTitle.description: Popup headline while a focus session is active.

popupActiveBody.message: Anchor houdt je op de sites die je leerkracht heeft toegestaan. Al het andere is gepauzeerd tot de sessie eindigt.
popupActiveBody.description: Popup body while a focus session is active.

popupClassCode.description: Label before the class join code in the popup.

popupAllowedSites.description: Label above the list of allowed sites in the popup.

popupAllowlistEmpty.message: Op dit moment zijn alleen de basissites van je school toegestaan.
popupAllowlistEmpty.description: Shown when the active session's allowlist adds no sites beyond the baseline.

popupIdleTitle.description: Popup headline when no focus session is running.

popupIdleBody.message: Je kunt vrij browsen. Anchor grijpt pas in als je leerkracht een focussessie voor je klas start.
popupIdleBody.description: Popup body when no focus session is running.

popupEyebrowIdle.description: Eyebrow label shown in the popup when no session is active.
